# Page 1^page=1
Name: Lisa A English | DOB: 7/25/1964 | MRN: 055656 | PCP: Jung Wook Kang Smith, MD | Legal Name: Lisa A English Progress Notes Updated Jun 22, 2026 OCCUPATIONAL THERAPY ASSESSMENT NOTE Narrative Pt eagreeable to stand today after she gets to chair with slide board. CGA for bed mobility and sit balances. Min 1 to use slide board to chair with cues and board placement,. Pt has c/o nausea reports from Ozempic and states cannot breath O2 88% after sliding to chair. She stopped moving fully onto center of chair asking for bedpan stood dep 75% 2 to clear half of bottom for placement of bedpan. Pt requiring much extra time and admission staff form Envive came into room to speak with pt while on bedpan . Pt left with Tech and nurse to complete hygiene in chair. Alarm pad under pt needs plugged in after staff done with hygiene assist. Recommendations Recommendation: Pt would benefit from continued therapy at a facility level Equipment Recommended: Rolling walker, Reacher, Sock aid, Long-handled sponge Barriers to discharge: Decreased cognition/safety awareness, Does not have assist needed for safe mobility/balance, Unable to complete basic hygiene This discharge disposition is recommended by OT based on this assessment; however, ultimate discharge disposition will be decided collaboratively with patient, caregivers, and multidisciplinary team. Outcome Measure Daily Activity Raw Score : 15 Daily Activity T-Scale Score: 34.69 Assessment Assessment: Decreased ADL status, Decreased UE ROM, Decreased UE strength, Decreased activity tolerance, Decreased self-care trans, Decreased high-level ADLs, Decreased safe judgement during ADL Plan OT Frequency: 6x/week Treatment Interventions: ADL retraining, Functional transfer training, UE strengthening/ROM, Activity tolerance, Patient/Family training, Equipment eval/education, Progress Notes by Stacy S at 06/22/26 1050

# Page 2^page=2
Compensatory technique education, Energy conservations/work simplification, Breathing techniques, Safety education, HEP Prior Level of Function Self Care (New): Needed some help Indoor Mobility (Ambulation) (New): Needed some help Stairs (New): Not applicable Functional Cognition (New): Independent Who do you live with?: Adult Child (son) Permanent Residence: Home Home Layout: One level, Ramped entrance ADL Assistance Eating Assistance: Setup or clean-up assistance Oral Hygiene/Grooming Assistance: Supervision or touching assistance, With extra time Shower/Bathe self: Substantial/Maximal assistance UE Dressing Assistance: Partial/moderate assistance, Less than 25% assist needed LE Dressing Assistance: Substantial/Maximal assistance Toilet Hygiene: Dependent Putting on/Taking off footwear: Dependent Functional Transfers Rolling left and right: Supervision or touching assistance (CGA) Lying to sitting on side of bed: Supervision or touching assistance (CGA) Sitting to lying: Up in chair after treatment Sit to Stand: Dependent, Less than 75% assist needed, Assist of 2, Adaptive Equipment Chair/bed to chair transfer: Partial/moderate assistance, Less than 25% assist needed Balance Sitting - Static: Supervision or touching assistance Sitting - Dynamic: Supervision or touching assistance (CGA) Standing - Static: Dependent, Less than 75% assist needed, Assist of 2 Standing - Dynamic: Unable to assess Cognition Overall Cognitive Status: (anxious) Following Commands: Follows one step commands with repetition, Follows one step commands with increased time UE Assessment RUE Assessment RUE Shoulder: AROM WFL RUE Elbow: AROM WFL RUE Wrist: AROM WFL RUE Hand: AROM WFL
